# Patterns that should be ignored by check-spelling

# "Sign in to" is a valid phrasal verb construction (sign in + to), not the same as "into"
# The line_forbidden.patterns rule flags \sin to\s but "sign in to" is correct English
[Ss]ign(?:ed)? in to\b

# "log in to" is similarly valid
[Ll]og(?:ged)? in to\b

# "signed in to" is valid
signed in to\b
